case_title: TINA MCKNIGHT PITTMAN RESPONDENT VS. NOBEL DESIGNS, INC. APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PITTMAN, TINA MCKNIGHT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAQUB, MARTY $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $91.85 INTEREST, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,413.85, SEE SCANNED DOC. APPELLANT NOBEL DISIGNS, INC. IS HEREBY DISMISSED.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2003 - CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 FOR TRIAL.
MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 514
EX PARTE MOTION FOR CONTINUE,FILE BY APPELLANT
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT NOBEL DESIGNS, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT PITTMAN, TINA MCKNIGHT HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. JEROME PITTMAN, TINA MCKNIGHT PITTMAN, BRYCE HAWTHORNE AND MARTY YAQUB ARE SWORN AND TESTIFY. MARTY YAQUB IS ADDED TO THIS ACTION AS A PARTY DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,250.00, PLUS $91.85, INTEREST AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $72.00, FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $2,413.85. ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HELD IN ABEYANCE AS FOLLOWS: IF DEFENDANT MARTY YAQUB PROVIDES THIS COURT WITH A COPY OF A CASHIERS' CHECK, PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF, FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT, BY NOON ON 11/20/03, THE COURT WILL ENTER JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTY YAQUB. IF SAID COPY OF A CASHIERS' IS NOT SUBMITTED TO THE COURT, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST MARTY YAQUB AND NOBEL DESIGNS, INC., JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. (514-MELLON)
